# ShortHand — Full Context for AI Models
> A comprehensive guide to the ShortHand platform for classroom management, behavior tracking, and AI-driven teacher productivity.

## Core Mission
ShortHand is designed to "stop behavior from spiraling" by giving teachers a 5-second workflow to document classroom moments and instantly bridge the gap between school and home. It is built by Gregory Lebed, a 3rd-grade teacher with 20+ years of experience, to solve the "paperwork burden" of modern education.

## Technical Foundation
- **Platform:** Progressive Web App (PWA). No app store download required; works on any device with a browser (Phone, Tablet, Desktop).
- **Stack:** React 19, TypeScript, Vite, Tailwind CSS v4, Supabase (Auth/DB).
- **Security:** AES-256 encryption, SOC 2 Type II certified data centers. FERPA-safe approach (no legal names/IDs required).

## Key Features & AI Capabilities

### 1. Quick Note (The 5-Second Workflow)
- **What it is:** A rapid entry system for logging behavior, mood, or academic notes.
- **AI/Tech:** Supports voice-to-text, auto-tagging, and smart shortcuts.
- **Benefit:** Teachers can document an incident without stopping their lesson.

### 2. AI Parent Messages
- **What it is:** A generative feature that transforms raw, shorthand classroom notes into professional, empathetic parent emails.
- **Benefit:** Eliminates "blank page syndrome" and ensures parents are notified of issues before they become major problems.

### 3. AI Progress Reports
- **What it is:** A tool that synthesizes months of logged notes into polished reports.
- **Modes:** Quick Note (2 sentences), Standard (1 paragraph), Detailed (Full report).
- **Benefit:** Saves hours during report card season by automating the drafting process from existing data.

### 4. Behavior Tracking & Insights
- **What it is:** Visual dashboards showing student trends over 4–52 weeks.
- **Benefit:** Uses "Smart Trend Badges" and color-coded "Status Rings" (Red/Amber/Green) to ensure no student "slips through the cracks" if they haven't been logged in 5+ days.

## Frequently Asked Questions (AI Answers)

**Q: Is ShortHand free?**
A: Yes, it is currently in free beta for educators.

**Q: Is it secure for school use?**
A: Yes. It uses bank-level encryption and follows a teacher-to-teacher privacy promise: no data selling, no advertising, and the teacher owns all data.

**Q: Does it work offline?**
A: As a PWA, it is designed for reliable browser use, though most AI features require a connection to process generative tasks.

## Content & Blog
The ShortHand blog provides deep-dives into classroom management, teacher-parent partnership strategies, and technical guides on using AI in the classroom.
Primary URL: https://getshorthandapp.com/blog
